creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Daniel,

is there a chance that you might look into
<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=151785> or take this to the upstream
maintainers?

I guess that some dependency information might be missing, or some error in the
parallel build concealed, so that we end up with an incomplete build -- this
shows then later during install phase.

Thank you.

Best regards
Matthias
